title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people having a barbecue. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A family is having a barbecue in their garden. A man is cooking food on a barbecue while two children are sitting at an outdoor table. There are plates, salad, drinks and garden chairs nearby.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people using a map. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Two tourists are looking at a map in the centre of a town. One person is pointing at the map while the other is carrying a backpack. There are old buildings, bicycles and a café behind them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
